testcase.name: @BeforeClass setup

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. null Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-UCCH3TV', ip: '192.168.1.5'

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. null Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-UCCH3TV', ip: '192.168.1.5' at testcase.name: @BeforeClass setup
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure.
